top_signals.title: Heineken Names Coffee CEO Oliveira to Lead Turnaround
top_signals.summary: Heineken NV appointed Rafael Oliveira chief executive officer, as the Dutch brewer breaks with habit by hiring an outsider to try to reverse a slump in demand.

top_signals.title: Schick Razor Maker Edgewell’s Shares Leap on Rejected Offer
top_signals.summary: Shares of Edgewell Personal Care Co., which makes Schick razors, rose nearly 18% in New York on Tuesday after the company rejected an unsolicited takeover offer from private equity firm Yellow Wood Partners.

top_signals.title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 23 2026
top_signals.summary: Bulkers: VV Bulker values remained mostly stable across all bulker sectors. Newcastlemax and Capesize values drifted marginally lower while Handysize saw positive movement especially for resales. Panamax Mont Blanc Hawk (81,600 DWT, 2017, Imabari) sold by Eiko Kisen for USD 32.8 mil, VV Value USD 31.1 mil. Panamax Marinicki C (76,600 DWT, 2005, Imabari) sold ...
